title: Deadlyboop Mod
description: A mod that adds streamer "DeadlyBoop", a 22 years old 6'4 person.
body:
# The Deadlyboop mod
### This mod adds streamer known as "Deadlyboop" into your minecraft expierence!
![Deadlyboop Mob in game*](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b777d8326c1d5abb2a8cf04cd5cf3b5fcc35bf6.png)

This mod also adds items like:
- Blahaj (Ikea shark plushie): Summons Deadlyboop and gives you an energy drink
- Monster (Energy Drink): Gives 1 Nutrition, hold to be followed by Deadlyboop
- Phone: Gives you an advancement.
- Deadlyboop's Picture: A deadlyboop's picture, consumable (not recommended)
- Computer: A way to get Deadlyboop's picture
- Money: A thing you need to "donate" to get Deadlyboop's picture by the computer.

### Deadlyboop emits sound!
She has 5 audio clips, which she plays off randomly.

### Deadlyboop is neutral, not passive.
If you will attack her, she will attack you and she won't stop!

## CRAFTING RECIPES:
--Blahaj:![Blahaj recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8acf9aebb6fb3f56677fde01909c2236de218c6.png)Money:![Money crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4ec3ae88a8134e72785cad254642a01bbca3cc7.png)

Monster:![Monster Energy Drink Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a0b937fa70fba90925d1c97e1b36bd1325b3b05.png)Phone:![Phone recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d25b3a23dc5486b170a64d54b9a33d1a87f4cdd6.png)

-----PC:![Computer Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d2c52f93a8956b4140be15fc449a3306d1cacc1.png)--![Deadlyboop's Picture Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94ace32f8368294ca2046f22a799776b01ba346b.png)
-----------------------------------------------------------Deadlyboop's Picture:
## Two consumable items:
- Monster Energy Drink: Gives 1 Nutrition and 0.3 saturation
- Deadlyboop's Picture: Removes 20 Nutrition and gives -1 saturation
### Creator's website
[Xenavia Site](https://xenavia.github.io/)
